Part.Source:
// HostWebServiceEfrete.Call(&EmpWebHost, &EmpWebBaseUrl, &EmpWebPor,&IsSecure)
&HttpClient.Host = &EmpWebHost //servidor &HttpClient.Port = &EmpWebPor &HttpClient.Secure = &IsSecure &httpclient.AddHeader(!'Accept-Encoding',!'gzip,deflate') &httpclient.AddHeader(!'Content-type',!'text/xml')
//ESTRUTURA IDENTIFICADA USANDO SOAP UI //WSDL NAO FUNCIONA COM CERTIFICADO VENCIDO, ENTÃO FIZ COMO SE FOSSE UM POST &LongVarchar = '<soapenv:Envelope xmlns:soapenv="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:log="http://schemas.ipc.adm.br/efrete/logon" xmlns:obj="http://schemas.ipc.adm.br/efrete/logon/objects" xmlns:obj1="http://schemas.ipc.adm.br/efrete/objects">' &LongVarchar += '<soapenv:Header/>' &LongVarchar += '<soapenv:Body>' &LongVarchar += ' <log:Logout>' &LongVarchar += ' <obj:LogoutRequest>' &LongVarchar += ' <obj1:Token>'+trim(&Token)+'</obj1:Token>' &LongVarchar += ' <obj1:Integrador>b754b48e-8c22-4cfc-bb0a-3524a76284c9</obj1:Integrador>' &LongVarchar += ' <obj1:Versao>1</obj1:Versao>' &LongVarchar += ' </obj:LogoutRequest>' &LongVarchar += ' </log:Logout>' &LongVarchar += '</soapenv:Body>' &LongVarchar += '</soapenv:Envelope>'
&HttpClient.AddString(&LongVarchar) &String = '/Services/LogonService.asmx' csharp System.Net.ServicePointManager.SecurityProtocol = System.Net.SecurityProtocolType.Tls12 | System.Net.SecurityProtocolType.Tls11 | System.Net.SecurityProtocolType.Tls; &HttpClient.Execute('POST',&String)
padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#EFRETELOGOUT', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &longvarchar, &PadDtaMod) //GRAVA NO PADRÃO USUARIO PARA FORMAR UM LOG DE CONEXÃO E VERIFICAR ERROS. &Erro = 0
If &HttpClient.ErrCode = 0 // Resposta &LongVarchar = '' &longvarchar = &HttpClient.toString() padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#EFRETELOGOUTRESPOSTA', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &HttpClient.toString(), &PadDtaMod) //GRAVA NO PADRÃO USUARIO PARA FORMAR UM LOG DE CONEXÃO E VERIFICAR ERROS. &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,'<soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,'</soap:Envelope>','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,'<soap:Body>','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,'</soap:Body>','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,'</soap:Body>','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,' xmlns="http://schemas.ipc.adm.br/efrete/objects"','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,' xmlns="http://schemas.ipc.adm.br/efrete/logon/objects"','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,' xmlns="http://schemas.ipc.adm.br/efrete/logon"','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,'<LogoutResponse>','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,'</LogoutResponse>','') &longvarchar = strReplace(&longvarchar,'<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>','')
padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#EFRETELOGOUTRESPOSTA_', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &longvarchar, &PadDtaMod) //GRAVA NO PADRÃO USUARIO PARA FORMAR UM LOG DE CONEXÃO E VERIFICAR ERROS. padraoUsuario.Call('G', '#EFRETELOGOUTRESPOSTAXML', &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &LogoutResult.ToXml(), &PadDtaMod) //GRAVA NO PADRÃO USUARIO PARA FORMAR UM LOG DE CONEXÃO E VERIFICAR ERROS. &LogoutResult.FromXml(trim(&longvarchar)) If &LogoutResult.Sucesso = true &Mensg = &LogoutResult.Excecao.Mensagem Else &Mensg = 'Falha no Logout '+ &LogoutResult.Excecao.Mensagem EndIf Else &Erro = val(str(GetSOAPErr())) &Mensg += 'DESC. ERRO:'+GetSOAPErrMsg() EndIf
